data.title: Ultrack Systems' Better Pets, (OTC: MJLB) secures Canadian trademark; advances U.S. application.
data.description: Ultrack Systems Inc.'s subsidiary, Better Pets, has achieved a significant milestone by securing a Canadian trademark registration. Additionally, the company is making progress on its U.S. trademark application. Ultrack Systems Inc., listed as MJLB on the OTC market, continues to expand its brand presence with this latest development. The Canadian trademark registration strengthens the company's intellectual property protection in that market, showcasing its commitment to growth and innovation. This news signifies a promising advancement for Ultrack Systems Inc. and its subsidiary Better Pets.

data.title: IQST marks 120 days on Nasdaq with 12 institutions holding ~4% shares; receives $18 price target from Litchfield Hills Research.
data.description: A recent development in IQST Inc. (NASDAQ: IQST) shows that 12 institutions have acquired approximately 4% of the company's shares. Litchfield Hills Research has set an $18 price target for IQSTEL, citing the company's acceleration of a high-margin growth strategy. This news comes as IQSTEL Inc., a Global Connectivity, AI & Digital Corporation, disclosed its plans on September 24, 2025, in New York.

data.title: Job seekers facing longer timelines and increased competition with 25% expecting 6-month searches. 83% willing to take different roles. Labor market uncertainty observed by seekers.
data.description: In a recent report, it was found that 25% of individuals anticipate a job search lasting about six months, with a significant 83% showing willingness to consider alternative positions to secure employment. The data comes from a study conducted in Oklahoma City on September 24, 2025. The dynamics of the labor market currently appear to be conflicting, leading job seekers in America to pay close attention. Despite employers appearing assured, workers seem to be...

data.title: MIB Agents accepting applications for research grants for rare bone cancer patients. BARNARD, Vt., Sept. 24, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: A nonprofit organization has recently granted funds to several projects centered on advancing research for rare bone cancer patients. The organization, MIB Agents, which specializes in pediatric osteosarcoma, is committed to improving the lives of patients, families, and healthcare professionals. The grants were awarded in BARNARD, Vt., on September 24, 2025. This initiative aims to support and progress research efforts in the rare bone cancer field.

data.title: NEAR Protocol spikes past $3 after network boost and AI integration, trading at $3.02 with strong bullish signals.
data.description: The price of NEAR Protocol has reached $3.02 after a recent network upgrade and integration of AI technology. Despite a slight decline in the last 24 hours, technical analysis indicates ongoing bullish momentum.

data.title: DossDocs integrates Docusign to aid lenders in meeting early disclosure deadlines faster. Collaboration announced by DossDocs from Irvine, Calif., on Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Irvine, California, on September 24, 2025, DossDocs, an on-demand loan document platform created by Doss Law, the nation's top mortgage law firm, revealed its integration with Docusign, a renowned e-signature technology company. This collaboration aims to provide lenders with a more efficient process.

data.title: Sandals & Beaches Resorts introduce "Nature's Vow" wedding inspiration in Caribbean, focusing on sustainability.
data.description: Sandals Resorts and Beaches Resorts have recently launched Nature's Vow, a fresh concept focusing on eco-friendly weddings inspired by the Caribbean islands. The announcement was made on September 24, 2025, in Montego Bay, Jamaica. This new initiative promotes purpose-driven celebrations incorporating sustainable practices. Nature's Vow aims to create memorable wedding experiences that are environmentally conscious. Sandals' and Beaches' dedication to eco-conscious wedding elements reflects a commitment to supporting a greener future in the wedding industry.

data.title: US Lawn Care Market to reach USD 89.47 billion by 2033 from USD 57.77 billion in 2024, growing at 4.98% CAGR.
data.description: A report on the United States Lawn Care Market has recently been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at USD 57.77 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 89.47 billion by 2033, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.98% during the forecast period. The growth in the market is attributed to factors such as the growing demand for residential landscaping, the rise in homeownership rates, expansion of commercial green spaces, and an increase in outdoor maintenance activities.

data.title: Building Transparency names Alison Kinn Bennett as Executive Director, marking a new era for the industry in Seattle.
data.description: Building Transparency announced today that Alison Kinn Bennett has been appointed as the organization's Executive Director in Seattle. Bennett's new role will involve overseeing the operations and strategic direction of the organization.

data.title: Pacific National Funding partners with Beachfront for debt consolidation & credit monitoring. Enhances lender ecosystem. Sioux Falls, SD.
data.description: Pacific National Funding (PNF) based in Sioux Falls, S.D., solidifies its position as a national frontrunner in consumer financial services through a recent collaboration with Beachfront. This partnership provides PNF access to Beachfront's comprehensive lender network, expansive marketing capabilities, and innovative financial wellness resources. The move, announced on Sept. 24, 2025, establishes PNF as a prominent player in the industry, enabling enhanced consumer options and outcomes.

data.title: BizzyCar secures $20M in funding, totaling $50M, to enhance AI-powered recall platform for dealerships.
data.description: ST. PETERS, Mo., Sept. 24, 2025 - BizzyCar, a prominent company offering AI-driven recall management solutions for dealerships, recently secured an additional $20 million in funding in a follow-on to its Series B round. With this latest funding, their total raised capital now reaches $50 million. The company is leveraging these funds to expand its AI-powered recall and mobile service platform to provide advanced solutions.

data.title: Dresner Advisory Services reveals 2025 Industry Excellence Award winners in Wisdom of Crowds Research.
data.description: Dresner Advisory Services announced the winners of its 2025 Industry Excellence Awards on September 24, 2025, in Nashua, New Hampshire. The awards recognized vendors who excelled in the company's 2025 Wisdom of Crowds® Business research. This annual honor highlights industry leaders and innovators, showcasing their contributions to the business landscape. This year's honorees demonstrate exceptional performance and leadership, setting benchmarks for others in the industry.

data.title: PEPSI® National Battle of the Bands expands to The Palm Beaches during MLK Weekend 2026 with inaugural event at Florida Atlantic University Stadium.
data.description: A highly anticipated event, the Pepsi National Battle of the Bands (NBOTB) will be debuting its first South Florida edition from January 16 to 18, 2026, at the Florida Atlantic University Stadium in THE PALM BEACHES, Fla. This showcase features renowned HBCU marching bands and promises an exciting display of talent. Mark your calendars for this historic event set to take place, as announced on September 24, 2025.

data.title: Shaklee acquires Modere assets in NZ, including Liquid Biocell Collagen & Natural Mineral Drink - expanding global presence.
data.description: In Miami on September 24, 2025, Shaklee, a prominent player in the nutrition and wellness sector, revealed its latest move in the international market. The company has solidified its global footprint by acquiring specific assets from Modere in New Zealand through a wholly owned subsidiary. This strategic acquisition highlights Shaklee's commitment to growth and market expansion.

data.title: Firehawk Aerospace receives over $60 million in investment, gains European investor, strengthens defense supply chain.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Prague, Firehawk Aerospace, a key player in defense technology focusing on advanced energetics and propulsion, announced a notable investment from Presto Tech Horizons (PTH), a distinctive defense and resilience tech fund established through a collaboration between undisclosed entities.
